# Gradient Flow Analysis v58

## Architecture
FederatedMix

## Flow Metrics
- Vanishing gradient score: 0.751
- Exploding gradient score: 0.804
- Effective depth: 60 layers

## Optimizations Applied
- Layer normalization
- Skip connections
- Attention gating
- Layer normalization
- Residual connections

## Recommendation
Add auxiliary losses for intermediate supervision.
